Lecture2/02_12_Remark.notes: All 5 claims fully proved. (1) PID→UFD via inferInstance, (2) PID→Dedekind via inferInstance, (3) k[x,y] not Dedekind — via DimensionLEOne contradiction (span{X} is nonzero prime but not maximal since quotient ≅ k[X] is not a field), (4) ℤ[√-13] not UFD — 2 is irreducible (norm argument) but not prime (2∤(1+√-13) and 2∤(1-√-13) yet 2|14), (5) Dedekind+UFD→PID via Mathlib. Zero sorries.
